prompt_text:
### Demographics: 77-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 5 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction
Cirrhosis
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Mild Cognitive Impairment with early Dementia
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Osteoporosis (on bisphosphonate therapy)
Alzheimer's Disease
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF (No); ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction; MASLD: Cirrhosis; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (father)
- Social history: Current smoker (5 cigarettes/day for 25 years; ~6.2 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Glimepiride 2mg once daily; Insulin Degludec 20units once daily; Olanzapine (10 mg nightly), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days), Donepezil (10 mg nightly), Memantine (10 mg twice daily), Alendronate (70 mg weekly), Calcium Carbonate 500 Mg + Cholecalciferol 1000 Iu (daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 89.9 kg; Height 166.3 cm; BMI 32.5 kg/m²; Blood pressure 137/84 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 10.7%; 9 months ago 11.0%; 6 months ago 11.0%; 3 months ago 11.0%; current 10.4%), FPG (12 months ago 310mg/dL; 9 months ago 265mg/dL; 6 months ago 317mg/dL; 3 months ago 284mg/dL; current 286mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 91.9kg; 9 months ago 90.9kg; 6 months ago 89.3kg; 3 months ago 89.8kg; current 89.9kg), Height (12 months ago 166.3cm; 9 months ago 166.3cm; 6 months ago 166.3cm; 3 months ago 166.3cm; current 166.3cm), BMI (12 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 32.0kg/m²; current 32.5kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 136mmHg; 9 months ago 137mmHg; 6 months ago 139mmHg; 3 months ago 138mmHg; current 137mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 85mmHg; 9 months ago 84mmHg; 6 months ago 88mmHg; 3 months ago 85mmHg; current 84mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 40U/L; 9 months ago 33U/L; 6 months ago 32U/L; 3 months ago 39U/L; current 38U/L), AST (12 months ago 45U/L; 9 months ago 49U/L; 6 months ago 49U/L; 3 months ago 40U/L; current 49U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.0mg/dL; current 1.0mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 23mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 22mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 23mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 22mL/min/1.73m²; current 19mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 468mg/g; 9 months ago 676mg/g; 6 months ago 729mg/g; 3 months ago 830mg/g; current 816mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 98mg/dL; 9 months ago 99mg/dL; 6 months ago 98mg/dL; 3 months ago 93mg/dL; current 96mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 48mg/dL; 9 months ago 51mg/dL; 6 months ago 49mg/dL; 3 months ago 49mg/dL; current 50mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 101mg/dL; 9 months ago 121mg/dL; 6 months ago 116mg/dL; 3 months ago 105mg/dL; current 111mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.8g/dL; 6 months ago 12.1g/dL; 3 months ago 12.0g/dL; current 11.7g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
